theme_notes: Taglines draw from the US-Iran ceasefire MOU awaiting Trump's final signature (Strait of Hormuz, 60-day nuclear talks window), the Treasury's proposed Trump $250 bill, the CIA gold-bar theft case, London's record-breaking 95°F heat wave, and the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final halftime show headlined by BTS, Madonna, and Shakira.
settled: Closer to peace than Trump and Iran. And just as fragile.
You've achieved what no CIA officer with a gym bag could — balance.
BTS, Madonna, Shakira, and now: a settled tab. Historic night.
youOwe: Less than a commemorative Trump $250 bill. Still embarrassing.
You owe less than a Strait of Hormuz transit fee. Barely.
Iran and Trump couldn't agree in a day. You've owed this for three weeks.
The CIA guy stole gold bars. You stole $150 and a friend's patience.
Not enough to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but enough to notice.
Two World Cup halftime tickets. You're spending it on someone else's tab.
You owe more than diplomats agreed on in good faith. That's a new low.
London hit 95°F and your debt is radiating the same energy.
You've borrowed enough to fill a CIA officer's gym bag. Allegedly.
That's enough to print four Trump $250 bills. Still 1,000 embarrassments.
Iran and the U.S. are negotiating their differences. You're just ghosting yours.
Your debt outlasted a war, a ceasefire, and two payment reminders.
A CIA officer took home gold bars. You took home a tab your partner can't forget.
BTS could retire on this. Shakira wouldn't. You definitely should pay up.
The Strait of Hormuz unblocks faster than your Venmo.
This number is geopolitically significant. Trump would put it on a bill.
The gold-bar CIA guy faces court. Your partner's building a case too.
The World Cup halftime show costs less to produce. Per minute.
theyOwe: Less than London owes the ozone layer. Still, it counts.
Technically they owe you. Technically Iran agreed to something too. Neither's official.
Barely a diplomatic incident. But enough to bring up at dinner.
The Strait of Hormuz tolls have been waived. This hasn't.
They owe you $200 and you still cover for them. You're not a partner, you're a ceasefire.
Even the CIA officer returned most of the gold. Eventually.
Madonna would notice this balance. She might not care, but she'd notice.
A round-trip flight out of this situation. Consider it.
London is 95°F and your patience is tracking hotter.
This is a ceasefire violation. Time for sanctions.
Iran got a 60-day extension. Your partner's had 600 days of grace.
Your partner borrowed like they work at the CIA. Zero accountability.
BTS is playing the World Cup Final. Your partner is playing dumb.
Trump signed off on less. Somehow you're still waiting on this.
A drone made it to Romania before this repayment got close.
That number needs its own UN resolution.
Shakira, Madonna, and BTS combined cost less. You're owed more than a halftime show.
At this point you're not a partner. You're an unsecured lender to a sovereign debt crisis.
